calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Entitlement
Off Calendar Jul-03-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Katherine Jeffrey for Brendan Kenneally (Petitioner).

The Court asked what legal basis it has for finding that the 401K and the pension plan are Trust assets. Ms. Jeffrey stated that those accounts have no designated beneficiaries and referred to the pour over will. The Petition to Determine Entitlement was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Stewart. (Not Reported)

Petition To Determine Entitlement
Off Calendar Jun-18-2014 Continued To Jul-02-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
